# Fernando Falci

> Full Stack Engineer with 15+ years of experience. React, Node.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, technical leadership. Former CTO at Namebase.io (Handshake ecosystem). Based in Barcelona, Spain.

## Pages

- [Home](https://falci.me/): Personal profile and contact links
- [CV](https://falci.me/cv): Full curriculum vitae with work experience, skills, education, and references

## Key Facts

- **Current role**: CTO at Namebase.io (2022-2026)
- **Location**: Barcelona, Spain
- **Email**: fernando@falci.me
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/falci
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Falci
- **Skills**: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, Java, AWS, Module Federation, Handshake/Web3
- **Languages**: Portuguese (native), English (fluent), Spanish (advanced)

## Work History

- **Namebase.io** - Sr. Software Engineer / CTO (2022-2026)
- **Adevinta** - Sr. Software Engineer (Feb 2020-Feb 2023)
- **eDreams Odigeo** - Sr. Software Engineer (Jun 2017-Feb 2020)
- **Mobile-DI** - Development Analyst (2015-Mar 2018)
